response: siragama tri ॥ guru mukh krapa kare bhagati kijeja binu guru bhagati nu hoi ॥ apae apu milae boohzai taa nirmal hoiva soei ॥ hari jeeu saachaa saachii baaanii sabadhi milaa vai ॥ 1॥ bhai re bhagatihiin kahe jagi aia ॥ puru gur kei sev nu kiine birta janam guavaia 1॥ rahaau ॥ apae jagajivan sukhdaata apae baksi milae ॥ jeeaj janta e kia veche kia ko aakhaae suunae ॥ guru mukh apae deeyai wadaae apae sev karaae 2॥ dekhi kutambu moohi lohbaana chaldia nali na jai ॥ sat guru sev gi gun niidhaina paai tis die keem nu paai ॥ hari prabhu saxaa meit prabhu meraa ante hoey saxaai 3॥ apnaai man chi ti khaae khaae binu guru apu jai ॥ hari jeeu daata bhagati vchall hai kari kirpa man ni vasae ॥ nank sohba surti deeyai prabhu apae guru mukhi de wadiaaei 4॥ 15॥ 48॥ *** gene language spirit visit ॥ all lowercase words appear at most three times ॥ sentences connected with hyphens ॥ no spaces between them ॥ same word at start and end ॥
